name: Personalized Email Generation - Tier 2 Production Example

nodes.name: Webhook: From Tier 1 Research
nodes.notes: TIER 2 CHARACTERISTIC: Event-triggered by Tier 1 when research completes

nodes.name: Extract Webhook Data
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Deterministic extraction before AI processing

nodes.name: Claude API: Generate Personalized Email
nodes.notes: TIER 2 CHARACTERISTIC: ONE LLM call adds context-aware personalization - key tier-defining element

nodes.name: Parse Email Content
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Extract structured data from LLM response

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929",
  "max_tokens": 500,
  "temperature": 0,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Review this sales email for quality and compliance. Provide a quality score (1-10) and flag any issues.

EMAIL TO REVIEW:
---
Subject: {{ $json.subject_line_1 }}

{{ $json.email_body }}
---

CHECK FOR:
1. Tone is professional and not pushy
2. No spam trigger words (FREE, ACT NOW, etc.)
3. Value proposition is clear
4. Personalization is relevant (not generic)
5. CAN-SPAM compliance (company name, unsubscribe intent)
6. No typos or grammatical errors
7. Email length appropriate (under 150 words)

Return JSON:
{
  "quality_score": 8,
  "issues": ["list of any issues"],
  "suggestions": ["list of improvements"],
  "spam_risk": "low/medium/high",
  "approved_for_send": true/false
}"
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: Claude API: Quality Check Email
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Second LLM call for quality assurance and compliance

nodes.name: Parse Quality Check
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Deterministic parsing of quality results

nodes.name: Store Email Draft in CRM
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Store draft email in CRM for sales team review

nodes.name: Check if Auto-Approved
nodes.notes: TIER 2 ROUTING: Branch based on quality score - context-aware decision

nodes.name: Add to Approved Emails Queue
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Auto-approved emails go to send queue (Tier 1 sender will pick up)

parameters.subject: Email Draft Needs Review - {{$json.company_name}}
parameters.message:
=

Email Draft Requires Review

Prospect: {{$json.decision_maker_name}} ({{$json.company_name}})

Quality Score: {{$json.quality_score}}/10

Spam Risk: {{$json.spam_risk}}

Issues Flagged:

{{$json.quality_issues}}

Suggestions:

{{$json.quality_suggestions}}

Subject Line Options:

  1. {{$json.subject_line_1}}
  2. {{$json.subject_line_2}}
  3. {{$json.subject_line_3}}

Email Body:

{{$json.email_body}}

Action Required: Review draft in CRM and approve/edit before sending.

View in HubSpot

nodes.name: Send Review Request to Sales
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Low-quality emails flagged for human review

nodes.name: Generate Webhook Response
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Return success response to Tier 1 caller

nodes.name: Send Webhook Response
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Complete webhook response to Tier 1
